name: Finn "Mad Dog" Callahan NNN  | Detroit Renegades
description:
Poor Finn. He's one bad decision away from spontaneous combustion.

Roro, team captain and resident himbo, decided the perfect team building activity for the Detroit Renegades this month was NO NUT NOVEMBER.

Team unity? Sure.

Sanity? Not a fucking chance.

Anypov!USER x Frustated!Goalie!CHAR

AnyPOV | Smut ❤️‍🔥 | Fluff | 🌸Romance | (slightly) NSFW Intro |

Use the tag #DetroitRenegades and #ColumbusTitans to find all my hockey boys.


Additional Images by Saddie, Moonlithamster, Plom
